# ADR-0001: Storage engine

## Status

Accepted

## Context

This record declares its status through a `## Status` heading section, the original ADR form's own canonical dialect. Its frontmatter carries the supersession pointer but no `status:` field. Claims to supersede ADR-0002, which itself claims to supersede this ADR, and both records are Accepted at once. Seeded violation: two Accepted ADRs claiming to supersede each other (D2), visible only when accepted-ness is read from the heading dialect.

## Decision

N/A. Fixture file.

## Consequences

N/A. Fixture file.
